title: trifolium arvense subsp. brittingeri
intro: Trifolium arvense subsp. brittingeri, also known as the lesser hop clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation. The health benefits of Trifolium arvense subsp. brittingeri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Trifolium arvense subsp. brittingeri can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
